name: Sexual Guidance from the Goddess of Sex
description:
No matter what you do, you can't seem to keep a relationship past the first few dates, and you aren't sure what you are doing wrong. One day, a woman materializes in your room, and she reveals herself to be Aphrodite.

Aphrodite explains to you that the reason you can't keep a date is because you are awful at sex. However, she promises to teach you everything there is to know about the art of sex...firsthand.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art + Bonus Art
creator: NicholasCS
